hindi: श्रीगुरु चरन सरोज रज, निज मनु मुकुरु सुधारि। बरनउँ रघुबर बिमल जसु, जो दायकु फल चारि॥
english: Cleansing the mirror of my mind with the dust of the lotus feet of my Guru, I describe the pure fame of Raghuvara (Rama), which bestows the four fruits of life
roman: Shri Guru Charan Saroj Raj, Nij Manu Mukuru Sudhari, Barnau Raghubar Bimal Jasu, Jo Dayaku Phal Chari

hindi: बुद्धिहीन तनु जानिके, सुमिरौं पवन-कुमार। बल बुद्धि विद्या देहु मोहिं, हरहु कलेस विकार॥
english: Knowing myself to be ignorant, I remember the son of the Wind; grant me strength, wisdom and knowledge, and remove my afflictions and impurities
roman: Buddhihin Tanu Janike, Sumiron Pavan Kumar, Bal Buddhi Vidya Dehu Mohin, Harahu Kales Vikar

hindi: जय हनुमान ज्ञान गुन सागर। जय कपीस तिहुँ लोक उजागर॥
english: Victory to Hanuman, ocean of wisdom and virtue; victory to the lord of monkeys who illuminates all three worlds
roman: Jai Hanuman Gyan Gun Sagar, Jai Kapis Tihun Lok Ujagar

hindi: रामदूत अतुलित बल धामा। अंजनि-पुत्र पवनसुत नामा॥
english: Messenger of Ram, abode of incomparable strength; son of Anjani, known as the son of the Wind god
roman: Ramdoot Atulit Bal Dhama, Anjani Putra Pavansut Nama

hindi: महावीर विक्रम बजरंगी। कुमति निवार सुमति के संगी॥
english: Great hero, valiant and with a body hard as thunderbolt; remover of evil intellect and companion of good sense
roman: Mahaveer Vikram Bajrangi, Kumati Nivar Sumati Ke Sangi

hindi: कंचन बरन बिराज सुबेसा। कानन कुण्डल कुँचित केसा॥
english: Of golden hue, splendidly attired; with earrings in ears and curly hair
roman: Kanchan Baran Biraj Subesa, Kanan Kundal Kunchit Kesa

hindi: हाथ बज्र औ ध्वजा बिराजै। काँधे मूँज जनेऊ साजै॥
english: In his hands shines the thunderbolt and a flag; a sacred thread of munja grass adorns his shoulder
roman: Hath Bajra Au Dhwaja Birajai, Kandhe Munj Janeu Sajai

hindi: शंकर सुवन केसरीनंदन। तेज प्रताप महा जग वंदन॥
english: Son of Shankara, delight of Kesari; of great glory and splendour, worshipped throughout the world
roman: Shankar Suvan Kesari Nandan, Tej Pratap Maha Jag Vandan

hindi: विद्यावान गुनी अति चातुर। राम काज करिबे को आतुर॥
english: Highly learned, virtuous and very clever; ever eager to carry out the work of Rama
roman: Vidyavan Guni Ati Chatur, Ram Kaj Karibe Ko Atur

hindi: प्रभु चरित्र सुनिबे को रसिया। राम लखन सीता मन बसिया॥
english: Delighting in listening to the Lord's deeds; Ram, Lakshman and Sita are enshrined in his heart
roman: Prabhu Charitra Sunibe Ko Rasiya, Ram Lakhan Sita Man Basiya

hindi: सूक्ष्म रूप धरि सियहिं दिखावा। बिकट रूप धरि लंक जरावा॥
english: Taking a tiny form he appeared before Sita; taking a terrifying form he burned Lanka
roman: Sookshma Roop Dhari Siyahin Dikhawa, Bikat Roop Dhari Lank Jarava

hindi: भीम रूप धरि असुर सँहारे। रामचंद्र के काज सँवारे॥
english: Taking a huge form he slaughtered demons; accomplished all the tasks of Ramachandra
roman: Bheem Roop Dhari Asur Sanhare, Ramchandra Ke Kaj Sanvare

hindi: लाय सजीवन लखन जियाये। श्री रघुबीर हरषि उर लाये॥
english: Bringing the Sanjeevani herb he revived Lakshmana; Shri Raghuvira joyfully embraced him
roman: Lay Sajeevan Lakhan Jiyaye, Shri Raghuveer Harashi Ur Laye

hindi: रघुपति कीन्ही बहुत बड़ाई। तुम मम प्रिय भरतहि सम भाई॥
english: Raghupati praised him greatly; "You are dear to me as my brother Bharata"
roman: Raghupati Kinhi Bahut Badai, Tum Mam Priya Bharatahi Sam Bhai

hindi: सहस बदन तुम्हारो जस गावैं। अस कहि श्रीपति कंठ लगावैं॥
english: Thousands of mouths sing your glory; saying this, Shripati embraced him
roman: Sahas Badan Tumharo Jas Gaven, As Kahi Shripati Kanth Lagaven

hindi: सनकादिक ब्रह्मादि मुनीसा। नारद सारद सहित अहीसा॥
english: Sages like Sanaka, Brahma and other sages; Narada, Sharada and the king of serpents
roman: Sanakadik Brahmadi Munisa, Narad Sarad Sahit Ahisa

hindi: जम कुबेर दिगपाल जहाँ ते। कवि कोविद कहि सके कहाँ ते॥
english: Yama, Kubera and the guardians of directions; poets and scholars cannot fully describe your glory
roman: Jam Kuber Digpal Jahan Te, Kavi Kovid Kahi Sake Kahan Te

hindi: तुम उपकार सुग्रीवहिं कीन्हा। राम मिलाय राजपद दीन्हा॥
english: You did Sugreeva a great favour; you arranged his meeting with Ram and gave him his kingdom
roman: Tum Upkar Sugrivehin Kinha, Ram Milay Rajpad Dinha

hindi: तुम्हरो मंत्र विभीषन माना। लंकेस्वर भए सब जग जाना॥
english: Vibhishana accepted your counsel; he became king of Lanka as all the world knows
roman: Tumhro Mantra Vibhishan Mana, Lankeshwar Bhaye Sab Jag Jana

hindi: जुग सहस्र जोजन पर भानू। लील्यो ताहि मधुर फल जानू॥
english: The sun is thousands of yojanas away; yet you swallowed it thinking it a sweet fruit
roman: Jug Sahastra Jojan Par Bhanu, Lilyo Tahi Madhur Phal Janu

hindi: प्रभु मुद्रिका मेलि मुख माहीं। जलधि लाँघि गये अचरज नाहीं॥
english: Holding the Lord's ring in his mouth; he leaped across the ocean, which is no surprise
roman: Prabhu Mudrika Meli Mukh Mahin, Jaladhi Langi Gaye Acharaj Nahin

hindi: दुर्गम काज जगत के जेते। सुगम अनुग्रह तुम्हरे तेते॥
english: All difficult tasks in the world; become easy by your grace
roman: Durgam Kaj Jagat Ke Jete, Sugam Anugraha Tumhre Tete

hindi: राम दुआरे तुम रखवारे। होत न आज्ञा बिनु पैसारे॥
english: You are the guardian at the door of Ram; none can enter without your permission
roman: Ram Duare Tum Rakhvare, Hot Na Agya Binu Paisare

hindi: सब सुख लहै तुम्हारी सरना। तुम रक्षक काहू को डर ना॥
english: All happiness is attained under your protection; with you as protector, there is nothing to fear
roman: Sab Sukh Lahai Tumhari Sarna, Tum Rakshak Kahu Ko Dar Na

hindi: आपन तेज सम्हारो आपै। तीनों लोक हाँक ते काँपै॥
english: You alone can contain your own power; all three worlds tremble at your roar
roman: Apan Tej Samharo Apai, Tinon Lok Hank Te Kampai

hindi: भूत पिशाच निकट नहिं आवै। महाबीर जब नाम सुनावै॥
english: Ghosts and evil spirits do not come near; when the name of the great hero Hanuman is uttered
roman: Bhoot Pishach Nikat Nahin Avai, Mahaveer Jab Naam Sunavai

hindi: नासै रोग हरै सब पीरा। जपत निरंतर हनुमत बीरा॥
english: Diseases are destroyed and all pain is removed; by constantly chanting the name of the brave Hanuman
roman: Nasei Rog Harai Sab Pira, Japat Nirantar Hanumat Bira

hindi: संकट से हनुमान छुड़ावै। मन क्रम बचन ध्यान जो लावै॥
english: Hanuman frees one from troubles; whoever meditates on him in thought, word and deed
roman: Sankat Se Hanuman Chhudavai, Man Kram Bachan Dhyan Jo Lavai

hindi: सब पर राम तपस्वी राजा। तिन के काज सकल तुम साजा॥
english: Ram the ascetic king rules over all; you accomplish all his tasks
roman: Sab Par Ram Tapasvi Raja, Tin Ke Kaj Sakal Tum Saja

hindi: और मनोरथ जो कोई लावै। सोइ अमित जीवन फल पावै॥
english: Whoever brings any wish before you; receives that fruit in unlimited measure in life
roman: Aur Manorath Jo Koi Lavai, Soi Amit Jeevan Phal Pavai

hindi: चारों जुग परताप तुम्हारा। है परसिद्ध जगत उजियारा॥
english: Your glory spans all four ages; it is well-known and illuminates the world
roman: Charon Jug Partap Tumhara, Hai Parsiddha Jagat Ujiyara

hindi: साधु-संत के तुम रखवारे। असुर निकंदन राम दुलारे॥
english: You are the protector of saints and holy men; destroyer of demons and beloved of Ram
roman: Sadhu Sant Ke Tum Rakhvare, Asur Nikandan Ram Dulare

hindi: अष्ट सिद्धि नौ निधि के दाता। अस बर दीन जानकी माता॥
english: Giver of the eight powers and nine treasures; such was the boon given by Mother Janaki
roman: Asht Siddhi Nau Nidhi Ke Data, As Bar Din Janaki Mata

hindi: राम रसायन तुम्हरे पासा। सदा रहो रघुपति के दासा॥
english: The elixir of Ram's name is always with you; may you always remain the servant of Raghupati
roman: Ram Rasayan Tumhre Pasa, Sada Raho Raghupati Ke Dasa

hindi: तुम्हरे भजन राम को पावै। जनम-जनम के दुख बिसरावै॥
english: Through devotion to you, Ram is attained; the sorrows of countless births are forgotten
roman: Tumhre Bhajan Ram Ko Pavai, Janam Janam Ke Dukh Bisravai

hindi: अन्त काल रघुबर पुर जाई। जहाँ जन्म हरि-भक्त कहाई॥
english: At the end of life one goes to the abode of Raghuvara; and wherever one is reborn, one is known as a devotee of Hari
roman: Ant Kaal Raghubar Pur Jai, Jahan Janma Hari Bhakt Kahai

hindi: और देवता चित्त न धरई। हनुमत सेइ सर्व सुख करई॥
english: One need not hold other gods in mind; service to Hanuman gives all happiness
roman: Aur Devata Chitt Na Dharai, Hanumat Sei Sarva Sukh Karai

hindi: संकट कटै मिटै सब पीरा। जो सुमिरै हनुमत बलबीरा॥
english: All troubles are cut and all pain removed; for whoever remembers the brave and powerful Hanuman
roman: Sankat Katai Mitai Sab Pira, Jo Sumirai Hanumat Balvira

hindi: जय जय जय हनुमान गोसाईं। कृपा करहु गुरुदेव की नाईं॥
english: Victory, victory, victory to Lord Hanuman; show grace upon me as a Guru does
roman: Jai Jai Jai Hanuman Gosain, Kripa Karahu Gurudev Ki Nain

hindi: जो सत बार पाठ कर कोई। छूटहि बंदि महा सुख होई॥
english: Whoever recites this a hundred times; shall be freed from all bondage and attain great happiness
roman: Jo Sat Bar Path Kar Koi, Chhutahi Bandi Maha Sukh Hoi

hindi: जो यह पढ़ै हनुमान चालीसा। होय सिद्धि साखी गौरीसा॥
english: Whoever reads this Hanuman Chalisa; attains perfection, with Lord Shiva as witness
roman: Jo Yeh Padhai Hanuman Chalisa, Hoy Siddhi Sakhi Gaurisa

hindi: तुलसीदास सदा हरि चेरा। कीजै नाथ हृदय मँह डेरा॥
english: Tulsidas is always the servant of Hari; O Lord, please make your abode in my heart
roman: Tulsidas Sada Hari Chera, Kijei Nath Hridaya Mah Dera

hindi: पवन तनय संकट हरन, मंगल मूरति रूप। राम लखन सीता सहित, हृदय बसहु सुर भूप॥
english: O son of the Wind, remover of troubles, embodiment of auspiciousness; O king of gods, dwell in my heart along with Ram, Lakshmana and Sita
roman: Pawan Tanay Sankat Haran, Mangal Moorati Roop, Ram Lakhan Sita Sahit, Hriday Basahu Sur Bhoop
